meta_title: For Freelancers: scaling apps to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to scaling apps and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Scaling Apps to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unfixable bugs. Learn how to scale your architecture using Antigravity and Claude Code to build reliable, high-performance apps faster.
content.answer_block: When your application grows too complex to debug, the root cause is often tight coupling and lack of observability. By scaling your app into modular services using Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for automated refactoring, you replace manual troubleshooting with automated, predictable, and scalable system patterns.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your codebase has morphed into an impenetrable fortress of spaghetti code. You’re staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, and every hotfix you ship introduces two new regressions. This is the 'debugging wall'—the point where your initial rapid prototype has become a liability to your reputation.

But the secret to scaling isn't just writing more code; it’s about architecting for modularity. By integrating AI-driven debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can decompose complex monoliths into manageable, observable, and testable units. It is time to stop fighting your own code and start engineering systems that scale alongside your growing business.

steps.title: Architectural Decomposition
steps.description: Identify the high-friction areas of your codebase and prepare them for modular separation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current dependency graph of my project and propose a modular architecture that separates business logic from data access layers to reduce debugging complexity.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring with Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to enforce strict interface boundaries between your newly defined modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactoring plan to decouple the authentication module from the primary API service without breaking existing functionality.

steps.title: Implementing Observability Hooks
steps.description: Inject automated logging and error-tracking headers to catch bugs before they reach production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest a standardized logging structure for all micro-services that integrates with my error tracking service and maintains request correlation IDs.

steps.title: Stress Testing for Bottlenecks
steps.description: Simulate high-load scenarios to expose hidden race conditions and memory leaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a stress test scenario that targets the identified bottleneck in the database connection pool using the new modular structure.

steps.title: Final Integration and Validation
steps.description: Verify the stability of the refactored system and finalize the deployment pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final codebase for any remaining hidden dependencies and confirm it meets production-grade standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message='Refactor: Modular architecture for scale'

pro_tips: Always use a 'sidecar' pattern for logging to keep your business logic clean and focused.
Implement feature flags for every major architectural change so you can rollback in seconds if the AI refactor introduces a regression.
Treat your AI-generated code as a junior developer's PR—always run a manual diff before merging to production.
Use correlation IDs across all service calls to trace a single user request through a distributed system effortlessly.
Automate your documentation by having Claude Code update your README whenever a module interface changes.
content.next_steps: Once your system is modularized, implement a CI/CD pipeline that integrates these Claude Code commands into your deployment process to ensure every future update maintains the same architectural integrity.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your growth. Master these tools and start shipping production-grade applications that make your clients look like rockstars. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
